description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, engineered with ClimaLite technology, has a round neck, short sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes in black on the shoulder and brand name appliqued on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not soak, tumble dry, or bleachWarm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logosSweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this ClimaLite engineered T-shirt from adidas. The technology regulates your body temperature keeping you fresh and comfortable, while the cotton-polyester fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes for the best resultsModel statistics The model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
